title: strychnos hirtiflora
intro: Strychnos hirtiflora, also known as the hairy-flowered nux vomica or hairy-flowered strychnine tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. The plant's roots are commonly used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
